posts.author: gvanderwerken (Gerrit Jan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m excited to start using the Jira integration but for some reason, the filters that I enter in the Jira integration recipe are being ignored. I have added filters for both the Monday and the Jira side but both seem to get ignored and updates are made to items that both match and do not match the filter. Has anyone had this before?

Monday filter729×363 13.8 KB

Jira filter736×359 14.6 KB
